films.title: Dragon Ball Z: Bardock - The Father of Goku
films.overview: Bardock, Son Goku's father, is a low-ranking Saiyan soldier who was given the power to see into the future by the last remaining alien on a planet he just destroyed. He witnesses the destruction of his race and must now do his best to stop Frieza's impending massacre.

films.title: Dream 9 Toriko x One Piece x Dragon Ball Z Super Collaboration Special!!
films.overview: A two-part crossover special featuring characters from Dragon Ball Z, One Piece and Toriko.

films.title: Dragon Ball Z: Lord Slug
films.overview: A Super Namekian named Slug comes to invade Earth. But the Z Warriors do their best to stop Slug and his gang.

films.title: Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge
films.overview: After defeating Frieza, Goku returns to Earth and goes on a camping trip with Gohan and Krillin. Everything is normal until Cooler - Frieza's brother - sends three henchmen after Goku. A long fight ensues between our heroes and Cooler, in which he transforms into the fourth stage of his evolution and has the edge in the fight... until Goku transforms into a Super Saiyan.

films.title: Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon
films.overview: The Z Warriors discover an unopenable music box and are told to open it with the Dragon Balls. The contents turn out to be a warrior named Tapion who had sealed himself inside along with a monster called Hildegarn. Goku must now perfect a new technique to defeat the evil monster.
